The activities produced in Te fractions isolated at
two different times after irradiation were measured.
Compiler's comment: Although the information given by
authors does not explain in detail how the cross
section was obtained from the measured data, compiler
believes that the reported data are meant to represent
the total sum of the ground and metastable state.
